text: Standing before this glass room, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with slight apprehension. The modernity and orderliness evoke thoughts about the artificial constructs that shape our environments. The colors and design seem engineered to stimulate thought, but the sterility also hints at a kind of emotional distance. I am drawn in, yet conscious of my own separateness from what lies behind the glass—a sense of anticipation, tinged with uncertainty.
